name: Guidetti 2008 Tadalafil Anaerobic Performance Athletes Extract
population_or_context: Well-trained subjects performing Wingate anaerobic testing.
methods: Double-blind crossover Wingate anaerobic power test after tadalafil 20 mg or placebo.
population_profile: Healthy well-trained male athlete-like sample; relevant to performance claims but small and not general-population men.
tadalafil_exposure: Single tadalafil 20 mg dose the day before a 30-second Wingate anaerobic test.
safety_findings: Abstract did not report clinical adverse events; lactate at 3-minute recovery was higher with tadalafil.
directness_to_target_population: Moderate for acute anaerobic performance in trained men, low for chronic low-dose tadalafil or strength/hypertrophy outcomes.
confounding_and_bias_limits: Small sample, acute exposure, one anaerobic protocol, limited adverse-event reporting, and abstract-level extraction.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence, but only single-dose anaerobic testing in trained subjects.
